glosses.de: eine Falle stellen; mit Sprengstoff präparieren
glosses.it: tendere una trappola; imbottire di esplosivi
glosses.zh-Hans: 设陷阱; 安置爆炸装置
glosses.yue: 設陷阱; 安放爆炸品
glosses.pt: armar uma armadilha; armar com explosivos
glosses.nl: een val zetten; van explosieven voorzien
glosses.nb: sette en felle; rigge med sprengstoff
glosses.sv: sätta en fälla; rigga med sprängladdning
glosses.ro: a întinde o capcană; a mina (cu explozibil)
glosses.da: sætte en fælde; udstyre med sprængstof
glosses.ja: 罠にかける; 爆発物を仕掛ける

sentences.target: Ils veulent piéger le renard ce soir.
sentences.reading: /il vœl pjeʒe lə ʁœnaʁ sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Ils veulent piéger le renard ce soir.
translations.ipa: /il vœl pjeʒe lə ʁœnaʁ sə swaʁ/
translations.en: They want to trap the fox tonight.
translations.es: Quieren atrapar al zorro esta noche.
translations.de: Sie wollen den Fuchs heute Abend mit einer Falle fangen.
translations.ko: 그들은 오늘 밤 여우를 덫으로 잡으려고 한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们今晚想用陷阱抓狐狸。
translations.yue: 佢哋今晚想用陷阱捉隻狐狸。
translations.ru: Они хотят поймать лису сегодня вечером.
translations.pt: Eles querem pegar a raposa esta noite.
translations.he: הם רוצים ללכוד את השועל הלילה.
translations.tr: Bu gece tilkiyi tuzakla yakalamak istiyorlar.
translations.vi: Họ muốn bẫy con cáo tối nay.
translations.nl: Ze willen vanavond de vos vangen.
translations.uk: Вони хочуть спіймати лисицю сьогодні ввечері.
translations.hu: Ma este csapdával akarják elfogni a rókát.
translations.hi: वे आज रात लोमड़ी को पकड़ना चाहते हैं।
translations.el: Θέλουν να παγιδεύσουν την αλεπού απόψε.
translations.nb: De vil fange reven i kveld.
translations.id: Mereka ingin menjebak rubah malam ini.
translations.sv: De vill fånga räven i kväll.
translations.da: De vil fange ræven i aften.
translations.fi: He haluavat pyydystää ketun tänä iltana.
translations.ja: 彼らは今夜、罠でキツネを捕まえたい。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (3rd person plural); grammatical subject of the finite verb 'veulent'.
Finite main verb, present indicative (3rd person plural); selects the infinitive 'piéger' as its complement.
Infinitive verb functioning as a non-finite complement (xcomp) of 'veulent'.
Definite article (masculine singular) introducing the direct object noun 'renard'.
Common noun (masculine singular); direct object of 'piéger'.
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'soir' to form a temporal NP.
Common noun; with 'ce' forms an adverbial time expression ('ce soir').

sentences.target: Je te piège juste pour rire.

translations.fr: Je te piège juste pour rire.
translations.en: I'm tricking you just for fun.
translations.es: Te estoy engañando solo por diversión.
translations.de: Ich veräpple dich nur zum Spaß.
translations.it: Ti prendo in giro solo per divertimento.
translations.ru: Я просто ради забавы тебя разыгрываю.
translations.pt: Eu só estou te pregando uma peça por diversão.
translations.he: אני עובד עליך רק בשביל הכיף.
translations.tr: Seni sadece eğlence olsun diye kandırıyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi trêu bạn chỉ cho vui thôi.
translations.ar: أنا أعمل عليك مقلبًا فقط للضحك.
translations.nl: Ik neem je alleen voor de lol in de maling.
translations.uk: Я просто для забави тебе розігрую.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हें सिर्फ मज़े के लिए बेवकूफ़ बना रहा हूँ।
translations.nb: Jeg lurer deg bare for moro skyld.
translations.id: Aku cuma menjahili kamu untuk bersenang-senang.
translations.sv: Jag lurar dig bara för skojs skull.
translations.cs: Jen tě pro zábavu vodím za nos.
translations.da: Jeg narrer dig bare for sjov.
translations.ja: 冗談で君をからかっているだけだ。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (1st person singular); grammatical subject of 'piège'.
Unstressed clitic object pronoun (2nd person singular); direct object of 'piège'.
Finite main verb, present indicative (1st person singular) agreeing with 'Je'.
Adverb limiting scope ('only/just'); modifies the clause headed by 'piège'.
Preposition introducing an infinitival complement ('rire'); expresses purpose.
Infinitive verb complement to 'pour'; idiomatic in 'pour rire' ('for fun').

translations.es: El cuestionario me vuelve a engañar.
translations.de: Das Quiz erwischt mich schon wieder.
translations.it: Il quiz mi inganna di nuovo.
translations.pt: O quiz me pegou de novo.
translations.vi: Bài trắc nghiệm lại làm tôi mắc bẫy.
translations.nl: De quiz heeft me weer te pakken.
translations.hi: क्विज़ ने मुझे फिर से फँसा दिया।
translations.ja: クイズにまた引っかかった。

tokens.explanation: Definite article (masculine singular) introducing subject noun 'quiz'.
Common noun (masculine); syntactic subject of 'piège'.
Unstressed clitic object pronoun (1st person singular); direct object of 'piège'.
Finite main verb, present indicative (3rd person singular) agreeing with 'Le quiz'.
Adverb meaning 'again/still'; modifies the verb phrase.

sentences.target: Ne cherchez pas à piéger les nouveaux.
sentences.reading: /nə ʃɛʁʃe pa a pjeʒe le nuvo/

translations.fr: Ne cherchez pas à piéger les nouveaux.
translations.ipa: /nə ʃɛʁʃe pa a pjeʒe le nuvo/
translations.en: Don't try to trap the newbies.
translations.es: No intenten engañar a los nuevos.
translations.it: Non cercate di fregare i nuovi.
translations.pt: Não tentem aprontar com os novatos.
translations.vi: Đừng cố gắng gài bẫy người mới.
translations.nl: Probeer de nieuwkomers niet te foppen.
translations.hu: Ne próbáljátok csőbe húzni az újakat.
translations.hi: नए लोगों को फँसाने की कोशिश मत करो।
translations.pl: Nie próbujcie zastawiać pułapek na nowych.
translations.el: Μην προσπαθείτε να παγιδεύετε τους νεοφερμένους.
translations.ro: Nu încercați să-i păcăliți pe noii veniți.
translations.da: Prøv ikke at narre de nye.
translations.ja: 新人を引っかけようとしないでください。

tokens.explanation: Negation particle; first element of the discontinuous negation 'ne ... pas', placed before the verb.
Finite main verb, imperative (2nd person plural); head of the clause.
Negation adverb completing 'ne ... pas'; scopes over the imperative.
Preposition introducing an infinitive of purpose/complement ('piéger').
Infinitive verb complement to 'à'; describes the action to avoid.
Definite article (plural) introducing the object NP 'nouveaux'.
Adjective (masculine plural) used substantively to mean 'newcomers'; direct object of 'piéger'.
